title: Librarian Manifest
description: Librarian runtime state: inventory, cross-reference graph, tag inventory, scan state, drift findings, architect recommendations, rename history. Schema peer shipped by SP01 T-5; runtime writes owned by SP04 (Generic Librarian).

by_type.description: Map: canonical file type -> inventory records or counts

xref_graph.description: Cross-reference graph (wikilinks, canonical-file links, explicit references). Inner shape owned by SP04 runtime writer.

tags.description: Tag inventory (tag -> occurrences). Inner shape owned by SP04 runtime writer.

last_scanned_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent full-scan cycle

findings_by_capability.description: Map: capability id -> scan findings record

last_scanned_log.description: Path to the most recent architect log file consumed

id.description: Architect recommendation ID. Pattern AR-NNN avoids collision with ENFORCEMENT-MAP R-NNN rules (per SP05 spec §R-C).

status.description: Lifecycle status. Tracked = under active monitoring; completed = recommendation acted on; deferred = revisit next cadence; rejected = decided against; open = newly emitted, awaiting triage.

source_report.description: Path to the architect-{date}.md report that emitted this recommendation.

first_seen.description: ISO-8601 date the recommendation was first emitted.

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 date the recommendation was most recently re-emitted (for convergence tracking).
